name: botnote
description: Notion for bots — capture + recall + project context for AI agents. Plugin bundles the botnote MCP server with /today, /show-todo, /remember, /recall, /add-task, /start-work, /done slash commands and a curator subagent.

botnote_url.title: botnote daemon URL
botnote_url.description: Default: http://127.0.0.1:4280. On tailnet use http://100.68.185.53:4280. Public https://botnote.net requires a bearer token.

botnote_token.title: API bearer token
botnote_token.description: Required only for https://botnote.net. Generate via Settings -> API tokens in the web UI, or `botnote tokens create` on the daemon host. Not needed when botnote_url is loopback or tailnet.
